acceptance_criteria: 1) Turn-1 vs turn-2+ input contract is enforced by tests. 2) Preview rendering is deterministic and bounded for large values. 3) Prompt contract docs/examples match runtime behavior.
description: Finish context/previews slice details so action input consistently carries variables_info on turn 1, execution_feedback on later turns, and preview formatting remains stable under large/nested inputs.
title: V2 slice: finalize context+preview contracts in action loop
